name: Taxonomic Profiling (Kraken2 + Bracken)
description: Per-sample taxonomic classification with Kraken2, abundance re-estimation with Bracken, and Krona visualization

inputs.name: Linked FASTQ reads
inputs.description: Short-read FASTQ files linked to selected samples
inputs.sourceDescription: Read records linked to selected study or order samples

outputs.name: Kraken2 report
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as a run artifact for review and download

outputs.name: Bracken abundance
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as a run artifact; top taxa are parsed into artifact metadata

outputs.name: Krona chart
outputs.description: Interactive per-sample Krona HTML visualization of the Bracken abundances
outputs.destinationDescription: Previewable from the pipeline output page

outputs.name: Summary TSV
outputs.description: Run-level table of the top taxon per sample
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as a run artifact for download

steps.name: Classify Reads (Kraken2)
steps.description: Assign taxonomy to each read against the configured Kraken2 database.

steps.name: Estimate Abundance (Bracken)
steps.description: Re-estimate species/genus abundances from the Kraken2 report at the configured rank.

steps.name: Visualize (Krona)
steps.description: Render an interactive Krona chart of the Bracken abundances for each sample.

steps.name: Collect Summary
steps.description: Aggregate the top taxon per sample into a run-level summary table.

parameters.name: brackenReadLength
parameters.description: Read length used to select the Bracken kmer distribution

parameters.name: brackenLevel
parameters.description: Taxonomic rank for Bracken abundance estimation

parameters.name: krona
parameters.description: Render an interactive Krona chart per sample
